description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized white SUV with a robust and aerodynamic body, featuring a prominent front grille with vertical slats and sleek, angular headlights. The vehicle has a slightly raised roofline with roof rails, blacked-out window trim, and tinted windows, giving it a sporty yet practical appearance. The side profile reveals four doors, flush door handles, and large, multi-spoke black alloy wheels with red brake calipers, suggesting a performance-oriented trim. The rear is characterized by wide taillights, a subtle roof spoiler, and dual exhaust outlets, emphasizing its powerful stance. The SUV's exterior is primarily finished in glossy white paint, with black accents on the wheels, window trim, and roof rails. The overall design is both functional and stylish, suitable for urban environments and family use.
description: A sleek, white, mid-sized SUV with black alloy wheels, red brake calipers, and a sporty, aerodynamic design. Features include a bold front grille, tinted windows, and roof rails.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bold grille with vertical slats, angular headlights, and a wide, aggressive stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four doors, black window trim, roof rails, and large black wheels with red brake calipers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays wide taillights, a roof spoiler, tinted rear window, and dual exhaust outlets.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same door and wheel features, with clear visibility of the roof and side profile.
attribute_wheel_design: Five double-spoke black alloy wheels with red brake calipers
